name: Marinated Feta with Greek Olives and Roasted
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Feta cheese, cut into cubes
1 cup Fresh black Greek olives, pit
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the roasted red bell peppers, cubed feta cheese, and pitted black Greek olives in a large bowl.
2. Add the olive oil to the bowl and toss gently until all ingredients are evenly coated.
3. Stir in the minced garlic, balsamic vinegar, fresh thyme, salt, freshly ground black pepper, and lemon juice.
4. Adjust the seasonings if needed, then cover the bowl and chill for at least 5 hours before serving.
5. Serve this marinated feta mixture with toasted pita bread as an appetizer.
